patch.value: CONTEXT: full bodies/comments/changed_fields exhausted agent token budgets on large repos. DECISION: all MCP read tools default to compact projection and mutations default to changed_field_count, with explicit opt-in (fullChangedFields/options.full/includeBody) for full data; applied only at the MCP boundary (CLI unaffected). CONSEQUENCES: multi-step agent loops stay within budget; agents needing field deltas must opt in; options.full must not be hijacked as the compaction control. EVIDENCE: src/mcp/server.ts withMutationCompaction; items pm-2cqx/pm-qrxs/pm-ch59.
ADR: Compact-by-default is the agent path at the MCP boundary
Compact-by-default is the agent path at the MCP boundary
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Compact-by-default is the agent path at the MCP boundary' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
